memberdef.name: WXS_ADD_LOCAL
memberdef.initializer: do { \ if ((item != NULL) && \ (xmlSchemaAddItemSize(&(WXS_BUCKET(ctx)->locals), 10, \ item) < 0)) { \ xmlSchemaPErrMemory(ctx); \ xmlFree(item); \ item = NULL; \ } \ } while (0)

memberdef.name: WXS_ADD_GLOBAL
memberdef.initializer: do { \ if ((item != NULL) && \ (xmlSchemaAddItemSize(&(WXS_BUCKET(ctx)->globals), 5, \ item) < 0)) { \ xmlSchemaPErrMemory(ctx); \ xmlFree(item); \ item = NULL; \ } \ } while (0)

memberdef.name: WXS_ADD_PENDING
memberdef.initializer: do { \ if ((item != NULL) && \ (xmlSchemaAddItemSize(&((ctx)->constructor->pending), 10, \ item) < 0)) { \ xmlSchemaPErrMemory(ctx); \ } \ } while (0)

memberdef.name: VERROR
memberdef.initializer: xmlSchemaCustomErr(ACTXT_CAST vctxt, err, NULL, type, msg, NULL, NULL);

memberdef.name: WXS_FIND_GLOBAL_ITEM
memberdef.initializer: if (xmlStrEqual(nsName, schema->targetNamespace)) { \ ret = xmlHashLookup(schema->slot, name); \ if (ret != NULL) goto exit; \ } \ if (xmlHashSize(schema->schemasImports) > 1) { \ xmlSchemaImportPtr import; \ if (nsName == NULL) \ import = xmlHashLookup(schema->schemasImports, \ XML_SCHEMAS_NO_NAMESPACE); \ else \ import = xmlHashLookup(schema->schemasImports, nsName); \ if (import == NULL) \ goto exit; \ ret = xmlHashLookup(import->schema->slot, name); \ }

memberdef.name: ADD_ANNOTATION
FACET_RESTR_MUTUAL_ERR
memberdef.initializer: xmlSchemaPCustomErrExt(pctxt, \ XML_SCHEMAP_INVALID_FACET_VALUE, \ WXS_BASIC_CAST fac1, fac1->node, \ "It is an error for both '%s' and '%s' to be specified on the "\ "same type definition", \ BAD_CAST xmlSchemaFacetTypeToString(fac1->type), \ BAD_CAST xmlSchemaFacetTypeToString(fac2->type), NULL);

memberdef.name: FACET_RESTR_ERR
memberdef.initializer: xmlSchemaPCustomErr(pctxt, \ XML_SCHEMAP_INVALID_FACET_VALUE, \ WXS_BASIC_CAST fac1, fac1->node, \ msg, NULL);

memberdef.name: FACET_RESTR_FIXED_ERR
memberdef.initializer: xmlSchemaPCustomErr(pctxt, \ XML_SCHEMAP_INVALID_FACET_VALUE, \ WXS_BASIC_CAST fac, fac->node, \ "The base type's facet is 'fixed', thus the value must not " \ "differ", NULL);

memberdef.name: NORMALIZE
memberdef.initializer: if ((! isNormalized) && \ (normalize || (type->flags & XML_SCHEMAS_TYPE_NORMVALUENEEDED))) { \ normValue = xmlSchemaNormalizeValue(atype, value); \ if (normValue != NULL) \ value = normValue; \ isNormalized = 1; \ }

briefdescription.para: Used to create a graph of schema relationships.
(extends xmlSchemaBucket)

detaileddescription.para: Reflects a schema. Holds some information about the schema and its toplevel components. Duplicate toplevel components are not checked at this level.

briefdescription.para: The abstract base type for schema components.
The abstract base type for annotated schema components.

detaileddescription.para: (Extends xmlSchemaBasicItem)

briefdescription.para: The abstract base type for tree-like structured schema components.

detaileddescription.para: (Extends xmlSchemaAnnotItem)

briefdescription.para: The abstract base type for tree-like structured schema components.

detaileddescription.para: (Extends xmlSchemaTreeItem)

briefdescription.para: A helper component to reflect attribute prohibitions.

detaileddescription.para: (Extends xmlSchemaBasicItem)

briefdescription.para: A component reference item (not a schema component) (Extends xmlSchemaBasicItem)
A particle component.

detaileddescription.para: (Extends xmlSchemaTreeItem)

briefdescription.para: A model group component.

detaileddescription.para: (Extends xmlSchemaTreeItem)

briefdescription.para: A model group definition component.

detaileddescription.para: (Extends xmlSchemaTreeItem)

briefdescription.para: The identity-constraint "field" and "selector" item, holding the XPath expression.
The augmented IDC information used for validation.
The key sequence of a node table item.
The node table item of a node table.
The identity-constraint binding item of the [identity-constraint table].
The state object used to evaluate XPath expressions.
an entry in hash tables to quickly look up keys/uniques
Fixes the content model of the type.

detaileddescription.para: URGENT TODO: We need an int result!

briefdescription.para: Convert the xmlSchemaTypeType to a char string.

simplesect.para: the char string representation of the facet type if the type is a facet and an "Internal Error" string otherwise.

briefdescription.para: parse a XML schema Import definition WARNING this interface is highly subject to change

parameterdescription.para: a subtree containing XML Schema information

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success, a positive error code if not valid and -1 in case of an internal error.

briefdescription.para: Checks the default values types, especially for facets.
Free the resources associated to the schema validation context; leaves some fields alive intended for reuse of the context.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaParserCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlSchemaPtr schema, xmlNodePtr node, xmlSchemaTypeType type, int withParticle)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaParseModelGroup

briefdescription.para: parse a XML schema Sequence definition.

detaileddescription.para: Applies parts of: Schema Representation Constraint: Redefinition Constraints and Semantics (src-redefine) (6.1), (6.1.1), (6.1.2)

Schema Component Constraint: All Group Limited (cos-all-limited) (2) TODO: Actually this should go to component-level checks, but is done here due to performance. Move it to an other layer is schema construction via an API is implemented.
WARNING this interface is highly subject to change

parameterdescription.para: a subtree containing XML Schema information
if a a model group with a particle

simplesect.para: -1 in case of error, 0 if the declaration is improper and 1 in case of success.

parameterdescription.para: the type of the schema item

simplesect.para: the component name of a schema item.
a list of member types of type if existing, NULL otherwise.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaAbstractCtxtPtr actxt, xmlSchemaTypePtr type, xmlSchemaTypePtr baseType, int subset)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaCheckCOSSTDerivedOK

briefdescription.para: Schema Component Constraint: Type Derivation OK (Simple) (cos-st-derived-OK)

detaileddescription.para: Checks whether type can be validly derived from baseType.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, an positive error code otherwise.

briefdescription.para: xmlSchemaCheckElementDeclComponent

detaileddescription.para: Validates the value constraints of an element declaration. Adds substitution group members.

briefdescription.para: Parse an attribute group definition reference.

detaileddescription.para: Note that a reference to an attribute group does not correspond to any component at all. WARNING this interface is highly subject to change

parameterdescription.para: a subtree containing XML Schema information

simplesect.para: the attribute group or NULL in case of error.

parameterdescription.para: the type of the schema item

simplesect.para: the component name of a schema item.

node associated with the schema component. NOTE that such a node need not be available; plus, a component's node need not to reflect the component directly, since there is no one-to-one relationship between the XML Schema representation and the component representation.

briefdescription.para: Returns the given QName in the format "{namespaceName}localName" or just "localName" if namespaceName is NULL.

simplesect.para: the localName if namespaceName is NULL, a formatted string otherwise.
a string representation of the type of processContents.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaValPtr val, xmlSchemaWhitespaceValueType ws, xmlChar **retValue, int for_hash)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaGetCanonValueWhtspExt_1

briefdescription.para: Get a the canonical representation of the value.

detaileddescription.para: The caller has to free the returned retValue.

parameterdescription.para: the whitespace type of the value
non-zero if this is supposed to generate a string for hashing

simplesect.para: 0 if the value could be built and -1 in case of API errors or if the value type is not supported yet.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlChar **buf, const xmlChar *itemDes, xmlSchemaBasicItemPtr item, xmlNodePtr itemNode)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaFormatItemForReport

briefdescription.para: The following order is used to build the resulting designation if the arguments are not NULL: 1a.

detaileddescription.para:
If itemDes not NULL -> itemDes 1b. If (itemDes not NULL) and (itemName not NULL) -> itemDes + itemName
If the preceding was NULL and (item not NULL) -> item
If the preceding was NULL and (itemNode not NULL) -> itemNode
If the itemNode is an attribute node, the name of the attribute will be appended to the result.
Returns a representation of the given item used for error reports.

simplesect.para: the formatted string and sets buf to the resulting value.

briefdescription.para: Builds a string consisting of all enumeration elements.

parameterdescription.para: the type holding the enumeration facets

simplesect.para: a string of all enumeration elements.

briefdescription.para: Handle an out of memory condition.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaParserCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlNodePtr node, int code, xmlErrorLevel level, const char *file, int line, const xmlChar *str1, const xmlChar *str2, const xmlChar *str3, int col, const char *msg,...)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaPErrFull

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaParserCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlNodePtr node, int code, const char *msg, const xmlChar *str1, const xmlChar *str2)

extra parameter for the message display

briefdescription.para: Handle an out of memory condition.

the node of the holder of the content

briefdescription.para: Allocate a new Schema structure.

simplesect.para: the newly allocated structure or NULL in case or error

briefdescription.para: Allocate a new Facet structure.

simplesect.para: the newly allocated structure or NULL in case or error

briefdescription.para: Allocate a new annotation structure.

simplesect.para: the newly allocated structure or NULL in case or error

briefdescription.para: Deallocate a annotation structure.
Deallocate a annotation structure.
Deallocate a Schema Notation structure.
Deallocates an attribute declaration structure.
Deallocates an attribute use structure.
Deallocates an attribute use structure.

detaileddescription.para: Deallocates a list of wildcard constraint structures.

briefdescription.para: Deallocates a wildcard structure.

Deallocate a Schema structure.

briefdescription.para: Dump the element.
Dump the annotation.
Dump a SchemaType structure.
Dumps a list of attribute use components.

Seeks an attribute with a name of name in no namespace.

simplesect.para: the attribute or NULL if not present.

briefdescription.para: Seeks an attribute with a local name of name and a namespace URI of uri.

simplesect.para: the attribute or NULL if not present.

briefdescription.para: Read a attribute value and internalize the string.

simplesect.para: the string or NULL if not present.

briefdescription.para: Lookup a global element declaration in the schema.

simplesect.para: the element declaration or NULL if not found.

briefdescription.para: Lookup a type in the schemas or the predefined types.

simplesect.para: the group definition or NULL if not found.

briefdescription.para: Lookup a an attribute in the schema or imported schemas.

simplesect.para: the attribute declaration or NULL if not found.

briefdescription.para: Lookup a an attribute group in the schema or imported schemas.

the target namespace of the attribute group

simplesect.para: the group definition or NULL if not found.

briefdescription.para: Check if a string is ignorable.

parameterdescription.para: the length of the string or -1

simplesect.para: 1 if the string is NULL or made of blanks chars, 0 otherwise

briefdescription.para: Adds a wildcard.

detaileddescription.para: It corresponds to a xsd:anyAttribute and xsd:any.

simplesect.para: the new structure or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Allocate a new annotation structure.

parameterdescription.para: the head of the substitution group
the new member of the substitution group

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaParserCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlSchemaPtr schema, xmlSchemaBasicItemPtr ownerItem, xmlAttrPtr attr, const xmlChar *value, const xmlChar **uri, const xmlChar **local)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaPValAttrNodeQNameValue

briefdescription.para: Extracts the local name and the URI of a QName value and validates it.

detaileddescription.para: This one is intended to be used on attribute values that should resolve to schema components.

parameterdescription.para: the parent as a schema object
the resulting namespace URI if found
the resulting local part if found, the attribute value otherwise

simplesect.para: 0, in case the QName is valid, a positive error code if not valid and -1 if an internal error occurs.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaParserCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlSchemaPtr schema, xmlSchemaBasicItemPtr ownerItem, xmlAttrPtr attr, const xmlChar **uri, const xmlChar **local)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaPValAttrNodeQName

briefdescription.para: Extracts and validates the QName of an attribute value.

detaileddescription.para: This one is intended to be used on attribute values that should resolve to schema components.

parameterdescription.para: the owner as a schema object
the resulting namespace URI if found
the resulting local part if found, the attribute value otherwise

simplesect.para: 0, in case the QName is valid, a positive error code if not valid and -1 if an internal error occurs.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaParserCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlSchemaPtr schema, xmlSchemaBasicItemPtr ownerItem, xmlNodePtr ownerElem, const char *name, const xmlChar **uri, const xmlChar **local)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaPValAttrQName

briefdescription.para: Extracts and validates the QName of an attribute value.

parameterdescription.para: the owner as a schema object
the parent node of the attribute
the resulting namespace URI if found
the resulting local part if found, the attribute value otherwise

simplesect.para: 0, in case the QName is valid, a positive error code if not valid and -1 if an internal error occurs.

briefdescription.para: Extracts and validates the ID of an attribute value.

simplesect.para: 0, in case the ID is valid, a positive error code if not valid and -1 if an internal error occurs.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaParserCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlNodePtr node, int min, int max, int def, const char *expected)
memberdef.name: xmlGetMaxOccurs

briefdescription.para: Get the maxOccurs property.

parameterdescription.para: a subtree containing XML Schema information

simplesect.para: the default if not found, or the value

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaParserCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlNodePtr node, int min, int max, int def, const char *expected)
memberdef.name: xmlGetMinOccurs

briefdescription.para: Get the minOccurs property.

parameterdescription.para: a subtree containing XML Schema information

simplesect.para: the default if not found, or the value

briefdescription.para: Converts a boolean string value into 1 or 0.

parameterdescription.para: the owner as a schema item

simplesect.para: 0 or 1.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaParserCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlNodePtr node, const char *name, int def)
memberdef.name: xmlGetBooleanProp

briefdescription.para: Evaluate if a boolean property is set.

parameterdescription.para: a subtree containing XML Schema information

simplesect.para: the default if not found, 0 if found to be false, 1 if found to be true

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaParserCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlSchemaPtr schema, xmlNodePtr node, int topLevel)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaParseSimpleType

briefdescription.para: parse a XML schema Simple Type definition WARNING this interface is highly subject to change

parameterdescription.para: a subtree containing XML Schema information
whether this is a top-level element

simplesect.para: -1 in case of error, 0 if the declaration is improper and 1 in case of success.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaParserCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlSchemaPtr schema, xmlNodePtr node, int topLevel)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaParseComplexType

briefdescription.para: parse a XML schema Complex Type definition WARNING this interface is highly subject to change

parameterdescription.para: a subtree containing XML Schema information
whether this is a top-level element

simplesect.para: the type definition or NULL in case of error

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaParserCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlSchemaPtr schema, xmlNodePtr node, xmlSchemaTypeType parentType)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaParseRestriction

briefdescription.para: parse a XML schema Restriction definition WARNING this interface is highly subject to change

parameterdescription.para: a subtree containing XML Schema information

simplesect.para: the type definition or NULL in case of error

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaParserCtxtPtr pctxt, xmlSchemaPtr schema, xmlNodePtr node, xmlSchemaItemListPtr uses, int parentType)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaParseLocalAttribute

briefdescription.para: parse a XML schema Attribute declaration WARNING this interface is highly subject to change

parameterdescription.para: a subtree containing XML Schema information

simplesect.para: the attribute declaration.

briefdescription.para: parse a XML schema List definition WARNING this interface is highly subject to change

parameterdescription.para: a subtree containing XML Schema information

simplesect.para: -1 in case of error, 0 if the declaration is improper and 1 in case of success.

briefdescription.para: parse a XML schema AnyAttribute declaration WARNING this interface is highly subject to change

parameterdescription.para: a subtree containing XML Schema information

simplesect.para: a wildcard or NULL.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaParserCtxtPtr pctxt, xmlSchemaBasicItemPtr ownerItem, xmlAttrPtr attr, const xmlChar *value, xmlSchemaTypePtr type)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaPValAttrNodeValue

briefdescription.para: Validates a value against the given built-in type.

detaileddescription.para: This one is intended to be used internally for validation of schema attribute values during parsing of the schema.

parameterdescription.para: the schema object owner if existent
the schema attribute node being validated
the built-in type to be validated against

simplesect.para: 0 if the value is valid, a positive error code number otherwise and -1 in case of an internal or API error.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaParserCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlSchemaBasicItemPtr ownerItem, xmlAttrPtr attr, xmlSchemaTypePtr type, const xmlChar **value)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaPValAttrNode

briefdescription.para: Extracts and validates a value against the given built-in type.

detaileddescription.para: This one is intended to be used internally for validation of schema attribute values during parsing of the schema.

parameterdescription.para: the schema object owner if existent
the schema attribute node being validated
the built-in type to be validated against

simplesect.para: 0 if the value is valid, a positive error code number otherwise and -1 in case of an internal or API error.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaParserCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlSchemaBasicItemPtr ownerItem, xmlNodePtr ownerElem, const char *name, xmlSchemaTypePtr type, const xmlChar **value)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaPValAttr

briefdescription.para: Extracts and validates a value against the given built-in type.

detaileddescription.para: This one is intended to be used internally for validation of schema attribute values during parsing of the schema.

parameterdescription.para: the schema object owner if existent
the name of the schema attribute node
the built-in type to be validated against

simplesect.para: 0 if the value is valid, a positive error code number otherwise and -1 in case of an internal or API error.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaParserCtxtPtr pctxt, xmlSchemaPtr schema, xmlNodePtr node, xmlAttrPtr attr, const xmlChar *namespaceName)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaCheckReference

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaParserCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlSchemaPtr schema, xmlNodePtr *child, xmlSchemaItemListPtr *list, int parentType, int *hasRefs)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaParseLocalAttributes

briefdescription.para: Parses attribute uses and attribute declarations and attribute group references.

parameterdescription.para: a subtree containing XML Schema information
the hosting type where the attributes will be anchored

briefdescription.para: parse a XML schema Attribute declaration WARNING this interface is highly subject to change

parameterdescription.para: a subtree containing XML Schema information

simplesect.para: -1 in case of error, 0 if the declaration is improper and 1 in case of success.

briefdescription.para: parse a XML schema Facet declaration WARNING this interface is highly subject to change

parameterdescription.para: a subtree containing XML Schema information

simplesect.para: the new type structure or NULL in case of error

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaParserCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlSchemaPtr schema, xmlSchemaWildcardPtr wildc, xmlNodePtr node)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaParseWildcardNs

briefdescription.para: Parses the attribute "processContents" and "namespace" of a xsd:anyAttribute and xsd:any.

detaileddescription.para: WARNING this interface is highly subject to change

parameterdescription.para: a subtree containing XML Schema information

simplesect.para: 0 if everything goes fine, a positive error code if something is not valid and -1 if an internal error occurs.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaParserCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlSchemaParticlePtr item, xmlNodePtr node, int minOccurs, int maxOccurs)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaPCheckParticleCorrect_2

briefdescription.para: Parsea a XML schema <any> element.

detaileddescription.para: A particle and wildcard will be created (except if minOccurs==maxOccurs==0, in this case nothing will be created). WARNING this interface is highly subject to change

parameterdescription.para: a subtree containing XML Schema information

simplesect.para: the particle or NULL in case of error or if minOccurs==maxOccurs==0

briefdescription.para: parse a XML schema Notation declaration

parameterdescription.para: a subtree containing XML Schema information

simplesect.para: the new structure or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: parse a XML schema Attribute Group declaration WARNING this interface is highly subject to change

parameterdescription.para: a subtree containing XML Schema information

simplesect.para: the attribute group definition or NULL in case of error.
0 if the value is valid, 1 otherwise.

memberdef.argsstring: (const xmlChar *value, int *flags, int flagAll, int flagExtension, int flagRestriction, int flagSubstitution, int flagList, int flagUnion)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaPValAttrBlockFinal

briefdescription.para: Validates the value of the attribute "final" and "block".

detaileddescription.para: The value is converted into the specified flag values and returned in flags.

simplesect.para: 0 if the value is valid, 1 otherwise.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaParserCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlSchemaIDCPtr idc, xmlSchemaIDCSelectPtr selector, xmlAttrPtr attr, int isField)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaCheckCSelectorXPath

briefdescription.para: Adds the annotation to the given schema component.

simplesect.para: the given annotation.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaParserCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlSchemaIDCPtr idc, xmlNodePtr node, int isField)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaParseIDCSelectorAndField

briefdescription.para: Parses a XML Schema identity-constraint definition's <selector> and <field> elements.

parameterdescription.para: a subtree containing XML Schema information

simplesect.para: the parsed identity-constraint definition.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaParserCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlSchemaPtr schema, xmlNodePtr node, xmlSchemaTypeType idcCategory, const xmlChar *targetNamespace)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaParseIDC

briefdescription.para: Parses a XML Schema identity-constraint definition.

parameterdescription.para: a subtree containing XML Schema information

simplesect.para: the parsed identity-constraint definition.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaParserCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlSchemaPtr schema, xmlNodePtr node, int *isElemRef, int topLevel)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaParseElement

briefdescription.para: Parses a XML schema element declaration.

detaileddescription.para: WARNING this interface is highly subject to change

parameterdescription.para: a subtree containing XML Schema information
set if the element is a reference
indicates if this is global declaration

simplesect.para: the element declaration or a particle; NULL in case of an error or if the particle has minOccurs==maxOccurs==0.

briefdescription.para: parse a XML schema Union definition WARNING this interface is highly subject to change

parameterdescription.para: a subtree containing XML Schema information

simplesect.para: -1 in case of internal error, 0 in case of success and a positive error code otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Parses a reference to a model group definition.

detaileddescription.para: We will return a particle component with a qname-component or NULL in case of an error.

briefdescription.para: Parses a XML schema model group definition.

detaileddescription.para: Note that the constraint src-redefine (6.2) can't be applied until references have been resolved. So we will do this at the component fixup level.
WARNING this interface is highly subject to change

parameterdescription.para: a subtree containing XML Schema information

simplesect.para: -1 in case of error, 0 if the declaration is improper and 1 in case of success.

briefdescription.para: removes unwanted nodes in a schemas document tree

parameterdescription.para: the list of top level nodes

simplesect.para: the internal XML Schema structure built from the resource or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Create an XML Schemas parse context for that file/resource expected to contain an XML Schemas file.

simplesect.para: the parser context or NULL in case of error

parameterdescription.para: the URI of the schema document

simplesect.para: a schema bucket if it was already parsed from schemaLocation, NULL otherwise.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaParserCtxtPtr pctxt, int type, const xmlChar *schemaLocation, xmlDocPtr schemaDoc, const char *schemaBuffer, int schemaBufferLen, xmlNodePtr invokingNode, const xmlChar *sourceTargetNamespace, const xmlChar *importNamespace, xmlSchemaBucketPtr *bucket)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaAddSchemaDoc

briefdescription.para: Parse an included (and to-be-redefined) XML schema document.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, a positive error code on errors and -1 in case of an internal or API error.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaParserCtxtPtr pctxt, xmlSchemaPtr schema, xmlNodePtr node, xmlChar **schemaLocation, int type)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaParseIncludeOrRedefineAttrs

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaParserCtxtPtr pctxt, xmlSchemaPtr schema, xmlNodePtr node, int type)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaParseIncludeOrRedefine

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaParserCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlSchemaPtr schema, xmlNodePtr node, xmlSchemaTypeType parentType)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaParseExtension

briefdescription.para: Parses an <extension>, which is found inside a <simpleContent> or <complexContent>.

detaileddescription.para: WARNING this interface is highly subject to change.

parameterdescription.para: a subtree containing XML Schema information

simplesect.para: the type definition or NULL in case of error

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaParserCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlSchemaPtr schema, xmlNodePtr node, int *hasRestrictionOrExtension)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaParseSimpleContent

briefdescription.para: parse a XML schema SimpleContent definition WARNING this interface is highly subject to change

parameterdescription.para: a subtree containing XML Schema information
set if restriction or extension was found

simplesect.para: the type definition or NULL in case of error

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaParserCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlSchemaPtr schema, xmlNodePtr node, int *hasRestrictionOrExtension)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaParseComplexContent

briefdescription.para: parse a XML schema ComplexContent definition WARNING this interface is highly subject to change

parameterdescription.para: a subtree containing XML Schema information
set if restriction or extension was found

simplesect.para: the type definition or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Create an XML Schemas parse context for that file/resource expected to contain an XML Schemas file.

simplesect.para: the parser context or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Create an XML Schemas parse context for that memory buffer expected to contain an XML Schemas file.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to a char array containing the schemas

simplesect.para: the parser context or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Create an XML Schemas parse context for that document.

detaileddescription.para: NB. The document may be modified during the parsing process.

simplesect.para: the parser context or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Free the resources associated to the schema parser context.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaParserCtxtPtr pctxt, xmlSchemaParticlePtr particle, int counter, xmlAutomataStatePtr end)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaBuildContentModelForSubstGroup

simplesect.para: 1 if nillable, 0 otherwise
1 if nillable, 0 otherwise

briefdescription.para: Create the automaton for the {content type} of a complex type.

simplesect.para: 1 if the content is nillable, 0 otherwise

briefdescription.para: Builds the content model of the complex type.
Resolves the references of an element declaration or particle, which has an element declaration as it's term.
Checks and builds the "member type definitions" property of the union simple type.

detaileddescription.para: This handles part (1), part (2) is done in xmlSchemaFinishMemberTypeDefinitionsProperty

simplesect.para: -1 in case of an internal error, 0 otherwise.
1 if the type has the given value type, or is derived from such a type.
the primitive type of the given type or NULL in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Clones the namespace constraints of source and assigns them to dest.

simplesect.para: -1 on internal error, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Unions the namespace constraints of the given wildcards.

detaileddescription.para: completeWild will hold the resulting union.

simplesect.para: a positive error code on failure, -1 in case of an internal error, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Intersects the namespace constraints of the given wildcards.

detaileddescription.para: completeWild will hold the resulting intersection.

simplesect.para: a positive error code on failure, -1 in case of an internal error, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Schema Component Constraint: Wildcard Subset (cos-ns-subset)

simplesect.para: 0 if the namespace constraint of sub is an intensional subset of super, 1 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Validation Rule: Wildcard allows Namespace Name (cvc-wildcard-namespace)

simplesect.para: 0 if the given namespace matches the wildcard, 1 otherwise and -1 on API errors.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaParserCtxtPtr pctxt, int action, xmlSchemaBasicItemPtr item, xmlSchemaBasicItemPtr baseItem, xmlSchemaItemListPtr uses, xmlSchemaItemListPtr baseUses, xmlSchemaWildcardPtr wild, xmlSchemaWildcardPtr baseWild)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaCheckDerivationOKRestriction2to4

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaParserCtxtPtr pctxt, xmlSchemaBasicItemPtr item, xmlSchemaWildcardPtr *completeWild, xmlSchemaItemListPtr list, xmlSchemaItemListPtr prohibs)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaExpandAttributeGroupRefs

briefdescription.para: Substitutes contained attribute group references for their attribute uses.

detaileddescription.para: Wildcards are intersected. Attribute use prohibitions are removed from the list and returned via the prohibs list. Pointlessness of attr. prohibs, if a matching attr. decl is existent a well, are checked.

parameterdescription.para: the intersected wildcard to be returned

briefdescription.para: Builds the wildcard and the attribute uses on the given complex type.

detaileddescription.para: ATTENTION TODO: Experimentally this uses pointer comparisons for strings, so recheck this if we start to hardcode some schemata, since they might not be in the same dict. NOTE: It is allowed to "extend" the xs:anyType type.

simplesect.para: -1 if an internal error occurs, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Evaluates if a type definition contains the given "final".

detaileddescription.para: This does take "finalDefault" into account as well.

simplesect.para: 1 if the type does contain the given "final", 0 otherwise.
1 if emptiable, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Schema Component Constraint: Particle Emptiable Checks whether the given particle is emptiable.

simplesect.para: 1 if emptiable, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Checks st-props-correct (2) + ct-props-correct (3).

detaileddescription.para: Circular type definitions are not allowed.

simplesect.para: XML_SCHEMAP_ST_PROPS_CORRECT_2 if the given type is circular, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Checks for circular type definitions.
Resolves type definition references.
Checks st-props-correct.

simplesect.para: 0 if the properties are correct, if not, a positive error code and -1 on internal errors.

briefdescription.para: Schema Component Constraint: Derivation Valid (Restriction, Simple) (cos-st-restricts)

detaileddescription.para: Checks if the given type (simpleType) is derived validly by restriction. STATUS:

simplesect.para: -1 on internal errors, 0 if the type is validly derived, a positive error code otherwise.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaAbstractCtxtPtr actxt, xmlNodePtr node, xmlSchemaTypePtr type, const xmlChar *value, xmlSchemaValPtr *retVal, int fireErrors, int normalize, int isNormalized)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaVCheckCVCSimpleType

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaParserCtxtPtr pctxt, xmlNodePtr node, xmlSchemaTypePtr type, const xmlChar *value, xmlSchemaValPtr *val)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaParseCheckCOSValidDefault

briefdescription.para: Schema Component Constraint: Element Default Valid (Immediate) (cos-valid-default) This will be used by the parser only.

detaileddescription.para: For the validator there's an other version.

parameterdescription.para: an optional node (the holder of the value)

simplesect.para: 0 if the constraints are satisfied, if not, a positive error code and -1 on internal errors.

briefdescription.para: (4.6) Constraints on Complex Type Definition Schema Components Schema Component Constraint: Complex Type Definition Properties Correct (ct-props-correct) STATUS: (seems) complete

simplesect.para: 0 if the constraints are satisfied, a positive error code if not and -1 if an internal error occurred.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaAbstractCtxtPtr actxt, xmlSchemaTypePtr type, xmlSchemaTypePtr baseType, int set)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaCheckCOSCTDerivedOK

briefdescription.para: Schema Component Constraint: Type Derivation OK (Complex) (cos-ct-derived-ok)

detaileddescription.para: STATUS: completed

parameterdescription.para: the to-be derived complex type definition

simplesect.para: 0 if the constraints are satisfied, or 1 if not.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaAbstractCtxtPtr actxt, xmlSchemaTypePtr type, xmlSchemaTypePtr baseType, int set)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaCheckCOSDerivedOK

briefdescription.para: Calls: Type Derivation OK (Simple) AND Type Derivation OK (Complex)

detaileddescription.para: Checks whether type can be validly derived from baseType.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, an positive error code otherwise.

briefdescription.para: (3.4.6) Constraints on Complex Type Definition Schema Components Schema Component Constraint: Derivation Valid (Extension) (cos-ct-extends)

detaileddescription.para: STATUS: missing: (1.5) (1.4.3.2.2.2) "Particle Valid (Extension)"

simplesect.para: 0 if the constraints are satisfied, a positive error code if not and -1 if an internal error occurred.

briefdescription.para: (3.4.6) Constraints on Complex Type Definition Schema Components Schema Component Constraint: Derivation Valid (Restriction, Complex) (derivation-ok-restriction)

detaileddescription.para: STATUS: missing: (5.4.2) ???
ATTENTION: In XML Schema 1.1 this will be: Validation Rule: Checking complex type subsumption

simplesect.para: 0 if the constraints are satisfied, a positive error code if not and -1 if an internal error occurred.

briefdescription.para: (3.4.6) Constraints on Complex Type Definition Schema Components

simplesect.para: 0 if the constraints are satisfied, a positive error code if not and -1 if an internal error occurred.

briefdescription.para: (3.4.3) Constraints on XML Representations of Complex Type Definitions: Schema Representation Constraint: Complex Type Definition Representation OK (src-ct)

simplesect.para: 0 if the constraints are satisfied, a positive error code if not and -1 if an internal error occurred.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaParserCtxtPtr pctxt, xmlSchemaFacetPtr facet1, xmlSchemaFacetPtr facet2, int lessGreater, int orEqual, int ofBase)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaDeriveFacetErr

briefdescription.para: Checks and computes the values of facets.

parameterdescription.para: the schema parser context or NULL
the optional name of the type

simplesect.para: 0 if valid, a positive error code if not valid and -1 in case of an internal or API error.

briefdescription.para: This one is intended to be used by xmlSchemaCheckGroupDefCircular only.

simplesect.para: the particle with the circular model group definition reference, otherwise NULL.

briefdescription.para: Checks for circular references to model group definitions.
Assigns the model group of model group definitions to the "term" of the referencing particle.

detaileddescription.para: In xmlSchemaResolveModelGroupParticleReferences the model group definitions were assigned to the "term", since needed for the circularity check.

Schema Component Constraint: All Group Limited (cos-all-limited) (1.2)
ctxt
the parser context
mg
the model group

briefdescription.para: This one is intended to be used by xmlSchemaCheckAttrGroupCircular only.

parameterdescription.para: the current attribute list to be processed

simplesect.para: the circular attribute group reference, otherwise NULL.

briefdescription.para: Checks for circular references of attribute groups.
Computation of: {attribute uses} property {attribute wildcard} property.

detaileddescription.para: Substitutes contained attribute group references for their attribute uses. Wildcards are intersected.

briefdescription.para: Substitutes contained attribute group references for their attribute uses.

detaileddescription.para: Wildcards are intersected.

Schema Component Constraint: Attribute Group Definition Properties Correct (ag-props-correct)
pctxt
the parser context
attrGr
the attribute group definition

briefdescription.para: Resolves references to attribute group definitions.
Schema Component Constraint: Attribute Declaration Properties Correct (a-props-correct)

detaileddescription.para:
Validates the value constraints of an attribute declaration/use. NOTE that this needs the simple type definitions to be already built and checked.
pctxt
a schema parser context
attr
an schema attribute declaration/use

briefdescription.para: Schema Component Constraint: Element Declaration Properties Correct (e-props-correct)

detaileddescription.para:
STATUS: missing: (6)
pctxt
a schema parser context
elemDecl
the element declaration

briefdescription.para: Schema Component Constraint: Substitution Group (cos-equiv-class)

detaileddescription.para:
In Libxml2 the subst. groups will be precomputed, in terms of that a list will be built for each subst. group head, holding all direct referents to this head. NOTE that this function needs:
circular subst. groups to be checked beforehand
the declaration's type to be derived from the head's type
STATUS:

briefdescription.para: Resolves references of a model group's {particles} to model group definitions and to element declarations.
Resolves the referenced attribute declaration.
Schema Component Constraint: Attribute Use Correct (au-props-correct)
Resolves the referenced type definition component.
Resolve keyRef references to key/unique IDCs.

detaileddescription.para: Schema Component Constraint: Identity-constraint Definition Properties Correct (c-props-correct)

briefdescription.para: parse a schema definition resource and build an internal XML Schema structure which can be used to validate instances.

simplesect.para: the internal XML Schema structure built from the resource or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Set the callback functions used to handle errors for a validation context.
Set the structured error callback.
Get the callback information used to handle errors for a parser context.

parameterdescription.para: contextual data for the callbacks result

simplesect.para: -1 in case of failure, 0 otherwise

briefdescription.para: Register a callback function that will be called to load documents or external entities.

parameterdescription.para: user data which will be passed to the loader

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaValidCtxtPtr vctxt, xmlSchemaPtr schema, xmlNodePtr node, const xmlChar *nsName, const xmlChar *location)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaAssembleByLocation

briefdescription.para: Expands an existing schema by an additional schema.

parameterdescription.para: the node that fired the assembling
the namespace name of the new schema

simplesect.para: 0 if the new schema is correct, a positive error code number otherwise and -1 in case of an internal or API error.

briefdescription.para: Expands an existing schema by an additional schema using the xsi:schemaLocation or xsi:noNamespaceSchemaLocation attribute of an instance.

detaileddescription.para: If xsi:noNamespaceSchemaLocation is used, noNamespace must be set to 1.

simplesect.para: 0 if the new schema is correct, a positive error code number otherwise and -1 in case of an internal or API error.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaValidCtxtPtr vctxt, xmlSchemaPtr schema, xmlNodePtr node, const xmlChar *value, xmlSchemaValPtr *val, int valNeeded)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaValidateNotation

briefdescription.para: Creates an augmented IDC definition item.

simplesect.para: the item, or NULL on internal errors.

briefdescription.para: Creates an augmented IDC definition for the imported schema.
Creates a new IDC binding.

parameterdescription.para: the IDC definition of this binding

simplesect.para: the new IDC binding, NULL on internal errors.

briefdescription.para: The validation context is used to store IDC node table items.

detaileddescription.para: They are stored to avoid copying them if IDC node-tables are merged with corresponding parent IDC node-tables (bubbling).

simplesect.para: 0 if succeeded, -1 on internal errors.

briefdescription.para: The validation context is used to store an IDC key.

simplesect.para: 0 if succeeded, -1 on internal errors.

briefdescription.para: Appends the IDC node-table item to the binding.

simplesect.para: 0 on success and -1 on internal errors.

briefdescription.para: Looks up an PSVI IDC binding, for the IDC definition and of the given matcher.

detaileddescription.para: If none found, a new one is created and added to the IDC table.

simplesect.para: an IDC binding or NULL on internal errors.

briefdescription.para: Frees an IDC key together with its compiled value.
Frees an IDC binding.

detaileddescription.para: Note that the node table-items are not freed.

briefdescription.para: Frees an IDC table, i.e.

detaileddescription.para: all the IDC bindings in the list.

parameterdescription.para: the first IDC binding in the list

briefdescription.para: Frees a list of IDC matchers.

parameterdescription.para: the first IDC matcher in the list

briefdescription.para: Caches a list of IDC matchers for reuse.

parameterdescription.para: the first IDC matcher in the list

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaValidCtxtPtr vctxt, xmlSchemaIDCMatcherPtr matcher, xmlSchemaIDCSelectPtr sel, int type)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaIDCAddStateObject

briefdescription.para: Creates/reuses and activates state objects for the given XPath information; if the XPath expression consists of unions, multiple state objects are created for every unioned expression.

simplesect.para: 0 on success and -1 on internal errors.

briefdescription.para: Evaluates all active XPath state objects.

parameterdescription.para: the nodeType of the current node

simplesect.para: the number of IC "field" state objects which resolved to this node, 0 if none resolved and -1 on internal errors.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaValidCtxtPtr vctxt, xmlChar **buf, xmlSchemaPSVIIDCKeyPtr *seq, int count, int for_hash)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaFormatIDCKeySequence_1

briefdescription.para: Pops all XPath states.

simplesect.para: 0 on success and -1 on internal errors.

briefdescription.para: Processes and pops the history items of the IDC state objects.

detaileddescription.para: IDC key-sequences are validated/created on IDC bindings.

simplesect.para: 0 on success and -1 on internal errors.

briefdescription.para: Creates helper objects to evaluate IDC selectors/fields successively.

simplesect.para: 0 if OK and -1 on internal errors.

briefdescription.para: Merges IDC bindings of an element at depth into the corresponding IDC bindings of its parent element.

detaileddescription.para: If a duplicate note-table entry is found, both, the parent node-table entry and child entry are discarded from the node-table of the parent.

simplesect.para: 0 if OK and -1 on internal errors.

briefdescription.para: Check the cvc-idc-keyref constraints.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaValidCtxtPtr vctxt, xmlNodePtr attrNode, int nodeLine, const xmlChar *localName, const xmlChar *nsName, int ownedNames, xmlChar *value, int ownedValue)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaValidatorPushAttribute

briefdescription.para: Creates/reuses and initializes the element info item for the current tree depth.

simplesect.para: the element info item or NULL on API or internal errors.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaAbstractCtxtPtr actxt, xmlNodePtr node, xmlSchemaTypePtr type, xmlSchemaValType valType, const xmlChar *value, xmlSchemaValPtr val, unsigned long length, int fireErrors)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaValidateFacets

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaValidCtxtPtr vctxt, const xmlChar *value, xmlSchemaValPtr *val, int valNeeded)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaValidateQName

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaValidCtxtPtr vctxt, const xmlChar *value, const xmlChar **nsName, const xmlChar **localName)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaVExpandQName

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaValidCtxtPtr vctxt, xmlSchemaAttrInfoPtr iattr, xmlSchemaTypePtr *localType, xmlSchemaElementPtr elemDecl)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaProcessXSIType

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaValidCtxtPtr vctxt, xmlSchemaNodeInfoPtr inode, xmlSchemaTypePtr type, const xmlChar *value)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaVCheckINodeDataType

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaValidCtxtPtr vctxt, int nodeType, const xmlChar *value, int len, int mode, int *consumed)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaVPushText

memberdef.argsstring: (void *ctx, const xmlChar *localname, const xmlChar *prefix, const xmlChar *URI, int nb_namespaces, const xmlChar **namespaces, int nb_attributes, int nb_defaulted, const xmlChar **attributes)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaSAXHandleStartElementNs

memberdef.argsstring: (void *ctx, const xmlChar *localname, const xmlChar *prefix, const xmlChar *URI)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaSAXHandleEndElementNs

briefdescription.para: Create an XML Schemas validation context based on the given schema.

simplesect.para: the validation context or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Workaround to provide file error reporting information when this is not provided by current APIs.
Free the resources associated to the schema validation context.
Check if any error was detected during validation.

simplesect.para: 1 if valid so far, 0 if errors were detected, and -1 in case of internal error.

briefdescription.para: Set the error and warning callback information.
Set the structured error callback.
Get the error and warning callback information.

simplesect.para: -1 in case of error and 0 otherwise

briefdescription.para: Sets the options to be used during the validation.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success, -1 in case of an API error.

briefdescription.para: Get the validation context options.

simplesect.para: the option combination or -1 on error.

briefdescription.para: Validate a branch of a tree, starting with the given elem.

simplesect.para: 0 if the element and its subtree is valid, a positive error code number otherwise and -1 in case of an internal or API error.

briefdescription.para: Validate a document tree in memory.

simplesect.para: 0 if the document is schemas valid, a positive error code number otherwise and -1 in case of internal or API error.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *ctx, const xmlChar *name, const xmlChar *ExternalID, const xmlChar *SystemID)
memberdef.name: internalSubsetSplit

memberdef.argsstring: (void *ctx, const xmlChar *name, const xmlChar *ExternalID, const xmlChar *SystemID)
memberdef.name: externalSubsetSplit

memberdef.argsstring: (void *ctx, const xmlChar *name, int type, const xmlChar *publicId, const xmlChar *systemId, xmlChar *content)
memberdef.name: entityDeclSplit

memberdef.argsstring: (void *ctx, const xmlChar *elem, const xmlChar *name, int type, int def, const xmlChar *defaultValue, xmlEnumerationPtr tree)
memberdef.name: attributeDeclSplit

memberdef.argsstring: (void *ctx, const xmlChar *name, int type, xmlElementContentPtr content)
memberdef.name: elementDeclSplit

memberdef.argsstring: (void *ctx, const xmlChar *name, const xmlChar *publicId, const xmlChar *systemId)
memberdef.name: notationDeclSplit

memberdef.argsstring: (void *ctx, const xmlChar *name, const xmlChar *publicId, const xmlChar *systemId, const xmlChar *notationName)
memberdef.name: unparsedEntityDeclSplit

memberdef.argsstring: (void *ctx, const xmlChar *localname, const xmlChar *prefix, const xmlChar *URI, int nb_namespaces, const xmlChar **namespaces, int nb_attributes, int nb_defaulted, const xmlChar **attributes)
memberdef.name: startElementNsSplit

memberdef.argsstring: (void *ctx, const xmlChar *localname, const xmlChar *prefix, const xmlChar *URI)
memberdef.name: endElementNsSplit

briefdescription.para: Plug a SAX based validation layer in a SAX parsing event flow.

detaileddescription.para: The original saxptr and dataptr data are replaced by new pointers but the calls to the original will be maintained.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to the original xmlSAXHandler
a pointer to the original SAX user data pointer

simplesect.para: a pointer to a data structure needed to unplug the validation layer or NULL in case of errors.

briefdescription.para: Unplug a SAX based validation layer in a SAX parsing event flow.

detaileddescription.para: The original pointers used in the call are restored.

parameterdescription.para: a data structure returned by xmlSchemaSAXPlug

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success and -1 in case of failure.

briefdescription.para: Allows to set a locator function to the validation context, which will be used to provide file and line information since those are not provided as part of the SAX validation flow Setting f to NULL disable the locator.
Internal locator function for the readers.

simplesect.para: 0 in case the Schema validation could be (de)activated and -1 in case of error.
0 if the document is schemas valid, a positive error code number otherwise and -1 in case of internal or API error.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchemaValidCtxt *ctxt, xmlParserInputBuffer *input, xmlCharEncoding enc, const xmlSAXHandler *sax, void *user_data)
memberdef.name: xmlSchemaValidateStream

briefdescription.para: Validate an input based on a flow of SAX event from the parser and forward the events to the sax handler with the provided user_data the user provided sax handler must be a SAX2 one.

parameterdescription.para: the input to use for reading the data
a SAX handler for the resulting events
the context to provide to the SAX handler.

simplesect.para: 0 if the document is schemas valid, a positive error code number otherwise and -1 in case of internal or API error.

briefdescription.para: Do a schemas validation of the given resource, it will use the SAX streamable validation internally.

parameterdescription.para: a future set of options, currently unused

simplesect.para: 0 if the document is valid, a positive error code number otherwise and -1 in case of an internal or API error.

briefdescription.para: allow access to the parser context of the schema validation context

simplesect.para: the parser context of the schema validation context or NULL in case of error.
